solla maaten… poga maaten

kannam thodum koondhal odhukka
nee saaivadhu ennai konjam paarkathaane

kanni moodi thoonguvadhu pol
nee nadipathu enthan kural ketkathaane

chinna pillai pola ne adampidipathenna solla

solla maaten… poga maaten

Kaadhalukku ilakaname, thannaal varum
chinna chinna thalaikaname
kaadhal adhai porukkanume
illai dhai katti vaithu udhaikanume

unnudaya kaiyaale thandanaigal thandhaale
en nenjam kondaadume
kanathil adikum adi muthaathale vendum adi
mathathellaam unnudaya idhalgalin  ishtappadi

endha dhesam ponnaa podhum
ennudaya sondhs dhesam unnadhu
idhayam thaane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Ennodu Vaa Vaa?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and the desire for a loved one to come closer, reflecting the emotional turmoil of separation.

How does Neethane En Ponvasantham relate to the song?

The song plays a crucial role in the movie, highlighting the protagonist's romantic journey and emotional struggles throughout the narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Karthik and composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, known for his timeless melodies.

When was Ennodu Vaa Vaa released?

The song was released in 2012, as part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ennodu Vaa Vaa, the protagonist expresses a deep yearning for their beloved, encapsulating the essence of romantic longing. The song's soothing melody, composed by Ilaiyaraaja, complements the heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar, creating an emotional atmosphere. As the characters navigate their relationship, this song serves as a poignant reminder of love's complexities. The gentle yet powerful delivery by Karthik evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a cherished piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennodu Vaa Vaa from Neethane En Ponvasantham is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by the talented Karthik, this song showcases the magical composition of Ilaiyaraaja, making it a timeless piece. The heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar add depth to the emotional journey, inviting listeners to immerse themselves in its soothing vibe.
stanzaMeanings: I don't say come to me, I won't let you go anywhere else. I don't say come to me, I won't let you go anywhere else.
You are creating a lot of trouble, standing and searching. Ah, my love, you should also be able to settle down in the flower garden, you have no right to do this.
I don't say come to me, I won't let you go anywhere else.
I don't say come to me, I won't let you go anywhere else.
When you touch my eyes, you should not look at me a little.
Like a virgin sleeping, you walk without hearing my voice.
What more doubts do I have? From now on, don't look at me with anger.
Like a little child, what does it mean to be stubborn? No one else is there for me, love has made you win.
When there is a fight, the people will remember it, and they will be scared and tremble when they hear it.
I don't say come to me, I won't let you go anywhere else. I don't say come to me, I won't let you go anywhere else.
For love, it is a guideline, small leaders will come by themselves. Love cannot be forced, nor can it be tied and released.
With your hand, if you give me gifts, my heart will dance, it will need the beat, it will not be anything else, according to your wishes.
Wherever I go, it is enough, my own country is your heart.
I don't say come to me, I won't let you go anywhere else.
You are creating a lot of trouble, standing and searching. Ah, my love, you should also be able to settle down in the flower garden, you have no right to do this.
I don't say come to me, I won't let you go anywhere else.
